scripts.dev:clean: export PATH="/Users/finn/.cache/codex-runtimes/codex-primary-runtime/dependencies/node/bin:$PATH" && if [ -d .next ]; then mv .next .next-corrupt-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S) 2>/dev/null || rm -rf .next; fi && next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p 3000
scripts.dev:reset: export PATH="/Users/finn/.cache/codex-runtimes/codex-primary-runtime/dependencies/node/bin:$PATH" && for p in 3000 3001 3004 3010; do ids=$(lsof -ti tcp:$p 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$ids" ] && kill -9 $ids || true; done && if [ -d .next ]; then mv .next .next-corrupt-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S) 2>/dev/null || rm -rf .next; fi && next dev -H 127.0.0.1 -p 3000
